epic_meaning.title: 10 lakh+ learners ke saath seekho!
epic_meaning.body: Workplace Conversations chapter mein aap ek bade movement ka hissa ho.

epic_meaning.title: English se career transform karo
epic_meaning.body: Chapter 3 of 8 -- aapki journey sirf language nahi, ye life change hai!

epic_meaning.title: Raj ke saath India ki sabse badi English community!
epic_meaning.body: Har din hazaaron log Interview Prep chapter mein practice kar rahe hain.

accomplishment.title: Workplace Conversations chapter milestone!
accomplishment.body: Waah! Chapter 3 of 8 mein consistently seekh rahe ho. Keep it up!

accomplishment.title: 7-day streak in Interview Prep!
accomplishment.body: Ek hafte se daily Raj ke saath practice. Consistency is superpower!

accomplishment.title: Chapter 3 complete!
accomplishment.body: Chapter 3 of 8 finish! Priya bhi proud hogi. Start Chapter 4!

empowerment.title: Workplace Conversations mein kya seekhoge?
empowerment.body: Grammar focus ya role-play? Aap decide karo -- Raj ready hai!

empowerment.title: Pro tip for Interview Prep
empowerment.body: 'I think' ki jagah 'I believe' use karo. Confident sound hoga!

empowerment.title: Your call in Chapter 3!
empowerment.body: Multiple learning paths available. Aap decide karo kaunsa try karna hai!

ownership.title: Aapka Interview Prep progress report!
ownership.body: Chapter 3 of 8 mein 50 coins, 3 badges earned. Ye sab aapka hai!

ownership.title: Workplace Conversations ke rewards!
ownership.body: Daily practice ka reward -- aapke coins badh gaye. Spend karo!

ownership.title: Your Chapter 3 achievements!
ownership.body: 15 new words, 2 badges, progress saved. Reclaim karo!

social_influence.title: 3 friends ne Interview Prep join kiya!
social_influence.body: Aapke dost bhi Raj ke saath seekh rahe hain. Invite more!

social_influence.title: Workplace Conversations trending!
social_influence.body: Chapter 3 sabse popular hai is hafte. Everyone's talking about it!

social_influence.title: Priya ne bhi complete kiya!
social_influence.body: Aapke jaise 5000+ professionals daily practice karte hain.

scarcity.title: Interview Prep bonus expiring!
scarcity.body: Chapter 3 mein special content sirf 2 din ke liye hai!

scarcity.title: Limited time quiz in Workplace Conversations!
scarcity.body: Raj ka special challenge sirf aaj available hai. Miss mat karo!

scarcity.title: Bonus content unlocked temporarily!
scarcity.body: Chapter 3 mein extra lessons 24 hours ke liye hai.

unpredictability.title: Surprise in Interview Prep!
unpredictability.body: Raj ne ek secret tip share kiya Chapter 3 mein. Dekhoge?

unpredictability.title: Plot twist in Workplace Conversations!
unpredictability.body: Priya ke saath meeting mein kuch unexpected hua!

unpredictability.title: Mystery challenge from Raj!
unpredictability.body: Chapter 3 mein ek hidden challenge hai. Solve kar sakte ho?

loss_avoidance.title: Interview Prep streak khatre mein!
loss_avoidance.body: Aaj practice na karo toh Chapter 3 ka streak tut jaayega!

loss_avoidance.title: Workplace Conversations progress fade!
loss_avoidance.body: Raj ke saath jo seekha wo bhulne lagta hai bina practice ke!

loss_avoidance.title: Chapter 3 se peeche mat raho!
loss_avoidance.body: Aapke batch ke log aage badh gaye. Catch up karo!
